name: Vanilla Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 loaf challah or brioche, cut into 1-inch slices (1 lb.)
1 tablespoon unsalted butter (for coating baking dish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bread slices in a large, buttered baking dish, allowing slices to overlap.
2. In a work bowl fitted with a food processor steel blade, mix eggs, half-and-half, milk, sugar, vanilla, and salt until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture over the bread slices, ensuring they are completely coated. Cover with plastic wrap and allow to sit in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours or overnight.
4. Remove plastic wrap and cover the baking dish with foil. Place the dish in a water bath filled with boiling water and bake in a preheated oven set to 375°F (190°C) for about 1-1/2 hours, or until the pudding is puffed and thoroughly set. Test by inserting a knife into the middle of the pudding; it should come out clean.
5. Sprinkle with powdered sugar and serve with your favorite syrup, berries, or relish.
Serves 8
